description: A transmission planner needs to schedule a planned outage of a major transmission line for maintenance.

nodes.task_description: Submit an outage request to the independent system operator (ISO) for the desired date and time.

expected_outcome.value: System submits the request to the ISO's outage scheduling system.

nodes.task_description: Run a power flow study to analyze the impact of the outage on the rest of the grid.

expected_outcome.value: The study shows the outage will cause overloads on two other lines unless a specific generator is redispatched.

nodes.task_description: Develop a mitigation plan, including the required generator redispatch, and submit it to the ISO for approval.

expected_outcome.value: System creates and submits the mitigation plan.
